Skip to main content

Files

fugue/cache/
refresh.rs

1use std::collections::HashSet;
2use std::time::Duration;
3
4use serde_json::Value;
5use sqlx::SqlitePool;
6use tracing::{debug, error, info, warn};
7
8use crate::cache::db;
9use crate::id::encode_id;
10use crate::proxy::backend::BackendClient;
11use crate::subsonic::models::NamespaceIds;
12
13/// Spawn the background cache refresh task.
14pub fn spawn_refresh_task(
15    db: SqlitePool,
16    backends: Vec<BackendClient>,
17    interval_secs: u64,
18) {
19    tokio::spawn(async move {
20        // Initial sync after a short delay to let the server start
21        tokio::time::sleep(Duration::from_secs(5)).await;
22        info!("cache refresh: initial sync starting");
23        refresh_all(&db, &backends, true).await;
24
25        let mut interval = tokio::time::interval(Duration::from_secs(interval_secs));
26        interval.tick().await; // skip the first immediate tick
27        loop {
28            interval.tick().await;
29            debug!("cache refresh: periodic sync starting");
30            refresh_all(&db, &backends, true).await;
31        }
32    });
33}
34
35/// Run a one-shot sync (for `fugue sync` CLI command / admin endpoint).
36pub async fn run_sync(db: &SqlitePool, backends: &[BackendClient]) {
37    refresh_all(db, backends, false).await;
38}
39
40async fn refresh_all(db: &SqlitePool, backends: &[BackendClient], incremental: bool) {
41    // Register backends so foreign keys are satisfied
42    for backend in backends {
43        if let Err(e) = sqlx::query(
44            "INSERT INTO backends (idx, name, url) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
45             ON CONFLICT(idx) DO UPDATE SET name = excluded.name, url = excluded.url",
46        )
47        .bind(backend.index as i64)
48        .bind(&backend.name)
49        .bind(&backend.base_url)
50        .execute(db)
51        .await
52        {
53            error!("failed to register backend {}: {}", backend.name, e);
54        }
55    }
56
57    let mut any_changed = false;
58    for backend in backends {
59        match refresh_backend(db, backend, incremental).await {
60            Ok(changed) => {
61                if changed {
62                    any_changed = true;
63                }
64            }
65            Err(e) => {
66                error!("cache refresh failed for backend {}: {}", backend.name, e);
67            }
68        }
69    }
70
71    match db::cache_stats(db).await {
72        Ok((artists, albums, tracks)) => {
73            info!(
74                "cache refresh complete: {} artists, {} albums, {} tracks",
75                artists, albums, tracks
76            );
77        }
78        Err(e) => warn!("cache stats query failed: {}", e),
79    }
80
81    // Only run dedup if something changed
82    if any_changed {
83        if let Err(e) = crate::dedup::run_dedup(db).await {
84            error!("dedup failed: {}", e);
85        }
86        let weights: Vec<(usize, i32)> = backends.iter().map(|b| (b.index, b.weight)).collect();
87        if let Err(e) = crate::dedup::resolver::update_scores(db, &weights).await {
88            error!("dedup score update failed: {}", e);
89        }
90    } else {
91        debug!("cache refresh: no changes detected, skipping dedup");
92    }
93}
94
95/// Refresh a single backend. Returns true if anything changed.
96async fn refresh_backend(
97    db: &SqlitePool,
98    backend: &BackendClient,
99    incremental: bool,
100) -> Result<bool, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
101    // 1. Quick change detection via getIndexes?ifModifiedSince
102    if incremental {
103        let last_modified = get_last_modified(db, backend.index).await;
104        if let Some(last_mod_ms) = last_modified {
105            let ms_str = last_mod_ms.to_string();
106            let resp = backend
107                .request_json("getIndexes", &[("ifModifiedSince", &ms_str)])
108                .await?;
109
110            // Check if the response indicates no changes
111            // If indexes.lastModified matches our stored value, nothing changed
112            let new_last_modified = resp
113                .get("indexes")
114                .and_then(|i| i.get("lastModified"))
115                .and_then(|l| l.as_i64())
116                .or_else(|| {
117                    resp.get("indexes")
118                        .and_then(|i| i.get("lastModified"))
119                        .and_then(|l| l.as_str())
120                        .and_then(|s| s.parse().ok())
121                });
122
123            if let Some(new_lm) = new_last_modified {
124                if new_lm <= last_mod_ms {
125                    // Check for new albums too (indexes only covers artist changes)
126                    let has_new_albums = check_new_albums(db, backend).await?;
127                    if !has_new_albums {
128                        info!(
129                            "cache refresh: backend {} unchanged (lastModified={}), skipping",
130                            backend.name, last_mod_ms
131                        );
132                        return Ok(false);
133                    }
134                    info!(
135                        "cache refresh: backend {} has new albums, doing incremental sync",
136                        backend.name
137                    );
138                    return incremental_sync(db, backend).await;
139                }
140            }
141
142            // Artist index changed — check if we can do incremental or need full
143            info!(
144                "cache refresh: backend {} index changed, doing incremental sync",
145                backend.name
146            );
147            return incremental_sync(db, backend).await;
148        }
149    }
150
151    // Full sync (first run or forced)
152    full_sync(db, backend).await
153}
154
155/// Check if there are new albums by comparing newest album timestamps.
156async fn check_new_albums(
157    db: &SqlitePool,
158    backend: &BackendClient,
159) -> Result<bool, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
160    // Get the newest album's created timestamp from our cache for this backend
161    let cached_newest: Option<(Option<String>,)> = sqlx::query_as(
162        "SELECT MAX(updated_at) FROM albums WHERE backend_idx = ?",
163    )
164    .bind(backend.index as i64)
165    .fetch_optional(db)
166    .await?;
167
168    // Fetch the single newest album from the backend
169    let resp = backend
170        .request_json("getAlbumList2", &[("type", "newest"), ("size", "1")])
171        .await?;
172
173    let newest_created = resp
174        .get("albumList2")
175        .and_then(|al| al.get("album"))
176        .and_then(|a| a.as_array())
177        .and_then(|arr| arr.first())
178        .and_then(|a| a.get("created"))
179        .and_then(|c| c.as_str());
180
181    if let (Some((Some(cached_ts),)), Some(backend_ts)) = (cached_newest, newest_created) {
182        if backend_ts > cached_ts.as_str() {
183            debug!(
184                "cache refresh: backend {} has newer albums (backend={} > cache={})",
185                backend.name, backend_ts, cached_ts
186            );
187            return Ok(true);
188        }
189        return Ok(false);
190    }
191
192    // If we can't compare, assume changed
193    Ok(true)
194}
195
196/// Incremental sync: only fetch new/changed albums and their tracks.
197async fn incremental_sync(
198    db: &SqlitePool,
199    backend: &BackendClient,
200) -> Result<bool, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
201    info!("cache refresh: incremental sync for backend {}", backend.name);
202
203    // 1. Refresh artist index (lightweight — just metadata)
204    let (_artist_count, _artist_ids) = sync_artists(db, backend).await?;
205
206    // 2. Fetch newest albums and check which ones are new to our cache
207    let mut new_album_count = 0;
208    let mut new_track_count = 0;
209    let mut offset = 0;
210    let batch_size: usize = 50;
211
212    loop {
213        let offset_str = offset.to_string();
214        let size_str = batch_size.to_string();
215        let resp = backend
216            .request_json(
217                "getAlbumList2",
218                &[("type", "newest"), ("size", &size_str), ("offset", &offset_str)],
219            )
220            .await?;
221
222        let albums = resp
223            .get("albumList2")
224            .and_then(|al| al.get("album"))
225            .and_then(|a| a.as_array())
226            .cloned()
227            .unwrap_or_default();
228
229        if albums.is_empty() {
230            break;
231        }
232
233        let mut found_existing = false;
234        for album in &albums {
235            let original_id = album.get("id").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
236            let namespaced_id = encode_id(backend.index, original_id);
237
238            // Check if this album already exists in our cache
239            let exists: Option<(i64,)> = sqlx::query_as(
240                "SELECT 1 FROM albums WHERE id = ?",
241            )
242            .bind(&namespaced_id)
243            .fetch_optional(db)
244            .await?;
245
246            if exists.is_some() {
247                found_existing = true;
248                continue;
249            }
250
251            // New album — cache it and fetch its tracks
252            cache_album(db, backend, album).await;
253            new_album_count += 1;
254
255            // Fetch tracks for this new album
256            match backend
257                .request_json("getAlbum", &[("id", original_id)])
258                .await
259            {
260                Ok(resp) => {
261                    if let Some(songs) = resp
262                        .get("album")
263                        .and_then(|a| a.get("song"))
264                        .and_then(|s| s.as_array())
265                    {
266                        for song in songs {
267                            cache_track(db, backend, song, &namespaced_id).await;
268                            new_track_count += 1;
269                        }
270                    }
271                }
272                Err(e) => warn!("incremental sync: failed to get album {}: {}", original_id, e),
273            }
274        }
275
276        // If we hit an album that already exists, we've caught up
277        if found_existing || albums.len() < batch_size {
278            break;
279        }
280        offset += batch_size;
281    }
282
283    // Update sync timestamp
284    let key = format!("backend_{}_last_sync", backend.index);
285    db::set_cache_meta(db, &key, &epoch_now_str()).await.map_err(|e| format!("set meta: {e}"))?;
286
287    // Store lastModified from getIndexes for next change detection
288    if let Ok(resp) = backend.request_json("getIndexes", &[]).await {
289        if let Some(last_mod) = resp
290            .get("indexes")
291            .and_then(|i| i.get("lastModified"))
292            .and_then(|l| l.as_i64())
293        {
294            let key = format!("backend_{}_last_modified", backend.index);
295            db::set_cache_meta(db, &key, &last_mod.to_string())
296                .await
297                .map_err(|e| format!("set lastModified: {e}"))?;
298        }
299    }
300
301    if new_album_count > 0 || new_track_count > 0 {
302        info!(
303            "cache refresh: backend {} incremental sync - {} new albums, {} new tracks",
304            backend.name, new_album_count, new_track_count
305        );
306        Ok(true)
307    } else {
308        info!("cache refresh: backend {} incremental sync - no new content", backend.name);
309        Ok(false)
310    }
311}
312
313/// Full sync: crawl everything from scratch.
314async fn full_sync(
315    db: &SqlitePool,
316    backend: &BackendClient,
317) -> Result<bool, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
318    info!("cache refresh: full sync for backend {} ({})", backend.name, backend.base_url);
319
320    // 1. Sync artists
321    let (artist_count, fresh_artist_ids) = sync_artists(db, backend).await?;
322
323    // 2. Crawl albums via getAlbumList2 in batches
324    let mut album_offset = 0;
325    let batch_size: usize = 500;
326    let mut total_albums = 0;
327    let mut fresh_album_ids = HashSet::new();
328
329    loop {
330        let offset_str = album_offset.to_string();
331        let size_str = batch_size.to_string();
332        let resp = backend
333            .request_json(
334                "getAlbumList2",
335                &[
336                    ("type", "alphabeticalByName"),
337                    ("size", &size_str),
338                    ("offset", &offset_str),
339                ],
340            )
341            .await?;
342
343        let albums = resp
344            .get("albumList2")
345            .and_then(|al| al.get("album"))
346            .and_then(|a| a.as_array())
347            .cloned()
348            .unwrap_or_default();
349
350        if albums.is_empty() {
351            break;
352        }
353
354        let batch_count = albums.len();
355        for album in &albums {
356            let original_id = album.get("id").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
357            fresh_album_ids.insert(encode_id(backend.index, original_id));
358            cache_album(db, backend, album).await;
359            total_albums += 1;
360        }
361
362        debug!(
363            "cache refresh: backend {} - albums batch offset={} count={}",
364            backend.name, album_offset, batch_count
365        );
366
367        if batch_count < batch_size {
368            break;
369        }
370        album_offset += batch_size;
371    }
372
373    // 2b. Remove stale albums (and their tracks) no longer on the backend
374    match db::delete_stale_albums(db, backend.index, &fresh_album_ids).await {
375        Ok(0) => {}
376        Ok(n) => info!(
377            "cache refresh: backend {} - removed {} stale albums",
378            backend.name, n
379        ),
380        Err(e) => warn!("cache refresh: failed to clean stale albums: {}", e),
381    }
382
383    // 2c. Remove stale artists no longer on the backend
384    match db::delete_stale_artists(db, backend.index, &fresh_artist_ids).await {
385        Ok(0) => {}
386        Ok(n) => info!(
387            "cache refresh: backend {} - removed {} stale artists",
388            backend.name, n
389        ),
390        Err(e) => warn!("cache refresh: failed to clean stale artists: {}", e),
391    }
392
393    // 3. Crawl tracks per album (only fresh albums)
394    let mut total_tracks = 0;
395    let album_ids: Vec<(String, String)> = sqlx::query_as(
396        "SELECT id, original_id FROM albums WHERE backend_idx = ?",
397    )
398    .bind(backend.index as i64)
399    .fetch_all(db)
400    .await?;
401
402    for (namespaced_album_id, original_album_id) in &album_ids {
403        match backend
404            .request_json("getAlbum", &[("id", original_album_id)])
405            .await
406        {
407            Ok(resp) => {
408                if let Some(songs) = resp
409                    .get("album")
410                    .and_then(|a| a.get("song"))
411                    .and_then(|s| s.as_array())
412                {
413                    for song in songs {
414                        cache_track(db, backend, song, namespaced_album_id).await;
415                        total_tracks += 1;
416                    }
417                }
418            }
419            Err(e) => {
420                warn!(
421                    "cache refresh: failed to get album {} from {}: {}, removing from cache",
422                    original_album_id, backend.name, e
423                );
424                if let Err(del_err) = db::delete_album(db, namespaced_album_id).await {
425                    warn!("cache refresh: failed to delete stale album: {}", del_err);
426                }
427            }
428        }
429    }
430
431    // Store sync timestamp
432    let key = format!("backend_{}_last_sync", backend.index);
433    db::set_cache_meta(db, &key, &epoch_now_str()).await.map_err(|e| format!("set meta: {e}"))?;
434
435    // Store lastModified for future change detection
436    if let Ok(resp) = backend.request_json("getIndexes", &[]).await {
437        if let Some(last_mod) = resp
438            .get("indexes")
439            .and_then(|i| i.get("lastModified"))
440            .and_then(|l| l.as_i64())
441        {
442            let key = format!("backend_{}_last_modified", backend.index);
443            db::set_cache_meta(db, &key, &last_mod.to_string())
444                .await
445                .map_err(|e| format!("set lastModified: {e}"))?;
446        }
447    }
448
449    info!(
450        "cache refresh: backend {} full sync done - {} artists, {} albums, {} tracks",
451        backend.name, artist_count, total_albums, total_tracks
452    );
453
454    Ok(true)
455}
456
457/// Sync the artist index for a backend. Returns (count, set of namespaced IDs).
458async fn sync_artists(
459    db: &SqlitePool,
460    backend: &BackendClient,
461) -> Result<(usize, HashSet<String>), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
462    let artists_resp = backend.request_json("getArtists", &[]).await?;
463    let mut count = 0;
464    let mut seen_ids = HashSet::new();
465
466    if let Some(indexes) = artists_resp
467        .get("artists")
468        .and_then(|a| a.get("index"))
469        .and_then(|i| i.as_array())
470    {
471        for index in indexes {
472            if let Some(artists) = index.get("artist").and_then(|a| a.as_array()) {
473                for artist in artists {
474                    let original_id = artist.get("id").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
475                    let name = artist.get("name").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
476                    let album_count = artist.get("albumCount").and_then(|v| v.as_i64()).unwrap_or(0);
477
478                    let namespaced_id = encode_id(backend.index, original_id);
479                    let mut data = artist.clone();
480                    data.namespace_ids(backend.index);
481
482                    db::upsert_artist(
483                        db,
484                        &namespaced_id,
485                        backend.index,
486                        original_id,
487                        name,
488                        album_count,
489                        &serde_json::to_string(&data)?,
490                    )
491                    .await
492                    .map_err(|e| format!("upsert artist: {e}"))?;
493
494                    seen_ids.insert(namespaced_id);
495                    count += 1;
496                }
497            }
498        }
499    }
500
501    debug!("cache refresh: backend {} - {} artists synced", backend.name, count);
502    Ok((count, seen_ids))
503}
504
505/// Get the stored lastModified timestamp for a backend's index.
506async fn get_last_modified(db: &SqlitePool, backend_idx: usize) -> Option<i64> {
507    let key = format!("backend_{}_last_modified", backend_idx);
508    db::get_cache_meta(db, &key)
509        .await
510        .ok()
511        .flatten()
512        .and_then(|v| v.parse().ok())
513}
514
515async fn cache_album(db: &SqlitePool, backend: &BackendClient, album: &Value) {
516    let original_id = album.get("id").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
517    let name = album.get("name").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
518    let artist = album.get("artist").and_then(|v| v.as_str());
519    let original_artist_id = album.get("artistId").and_then(|v| v.as_str());
520    let year = album.get("year").and_then(|v| v.as_i64());
521    let genre = album.get("genre").and_then(|v| v.as_str());
522    let song_count = album.get("songCount").and_then(|v| v.as_i64()).unwrap_or(0);
523    let duration = album.get("duration").and_then(|v| v.as_i64()).unwrap_or(0);
524
525    let namespaced_id = encode_id(backend.index, original_id);
526    let namespaced_artist_id = original_artist_id.map(|aid| encode_id(backend.index, aid));
527
528    let mut data = album.clone();
529    data.namespace_ids(backend.index);
530
531    let json_str = match serde_json::to_string(&data) {
532        Ok(s) => s,
533        Err(_) => return,
534    };
535
536    let _ = db::upsert_album(
537        db,
538        &namespaced_id,
539        backend.index,
540        original_id,
541        name,
542        artist,
543        namespaced_artist_id.as_deref(),
544        year,
545        genre,
546        song_count,
547        duration,
548        &json_str,
549    )
550    .await;
551}
552
553async fn cache_track(
554    db: &SqlitePool,
555    backend: &BackendClient,
556    song: &Value,
557    namespaced_album_id: &str,
558) {
559    let original_id = song.get("id").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
560    let title = song.get("title").and_then(|v| v.as_str()).unwrap_or_default();
561    let artist = song.get("artist").and_then(|v| v.as_str());
562    let album = song.get("album").and_then(|v| v.as_str());
563    let track_number = song.get("track").and_then(|v| v.as_i64());
564    let duration = song.get("duration").and_then(|v| v.as_i64());
565    let bitrate = song.get("bitRate").and_then(|v| v.as_i64());
566    let content_type = song.get("contentType").and_then(|v| v.as_str());
567    let suffix = song.get("suffix").and_then(|v| v.as_str());
568
569    let namespaced_id = encode_id(backend.index, original_id);
570
571    let mut data = song.clone();
572    data.namespace_ids(backend.index);
573
574    let json_str = match serde_json::to_string(&data) {
575        Ok(s) => s,
576        Err(_) => return,
577    };
578
579    let _ = db::upsert_track(
580        db,
581        &namespaced_id,
582        backend.index,
583        original_id,
584        title,
585        artist,
586        album,
587        Some(namespaced_album_id),
588        track_number,
589        duration,
590        bitrate,
591        content_type,
592        suffix,
593        &json_str,
594    )
595    .await;
596}
597
598fn epoch_now_str() -> String {
599    std::time::SystemTime::now()
600        .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)
601        .unwrap_or_default()
602        .as_secs()
603        .to_string()
604}
